description: List all OAPPs for the currently beamed-in avatar.
notes: Requires avatar beam-in. Combine with --username / --password flags or STAR_CLI_USERNAME/PASSWORD env vars.
Returns { success: true, data: [ { id, name, description, version, ... }, ... ] }.
Use 'oapp list installed' to show only installed OAPPs, 'oapp list published' for published ones.
